header.title: My lessons
header.subtitle: Track your lessons, schedule and tutors

promo.title: Schedule your next lesson with Alex Smith
promo.description: You are on a 3-week streak. Keep your learning momentum and reach your goals faster.

upcoming.title: Upcoming lessons
upcoming.emptyDescription: Don't put your goals on hold! Schedule your next lesson now to see progress.
upcoming.rescheduleNotice: This lesson starts in less than 12 hours and can no longer be rescheduled. You can still cancel if needed.

subscription.rescheduleComingSoon: Subscription reschedule will be available soon.

dialog.title: Reschedule subscription lesson
dialog.subtitle: Pick a new time with {tutor} (currently {date} · {time}).
dialog.failed: Could not reschedule the lesson. Please try another time.

dialog.title: Cancel subscription lesson
dialog.successNoCredit: Lesson cancelled. No refund is issued for subscription lesson cancellations.

policy.eligibleDescription: No refund is issued for subscription lesson cancellations.
policy.eligibleDescriptionNoAmount: No refund is issued for subscription lesson cancellations.
policy.notEligibleDescription: No refund is issued for subscription lesson cancellations.
policy.noRefundDescription: Your cancellation request will be recorded and sent to your tutor. No refund is issued for subscription lesson cancellations.
policy.fallback: No refund is issued for subscription lesson cancellations.

dialog.title: Complain about a lesson
dialog.subtitle: Tell us what went wrong with your lesson with {tutor} ({date} · {time}).
dialog.windowHint: You can submit a complaint within {hours} hours after the lesson ends. Admin will review and may refund to your wallet.
dialog.imagesHint: Upload up to {max} images (JPG, PNG, WebP, max {maxMb} MB each).
dialog.imagesMax: You can upload at most {max} photos.
dialog.imagesInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG, or WebP images are allowed.
dialog.imagesTooLarge: Each image must be {maxMb} MB or smaller.
dialog.imagesUploadFailed: Could not upload image. Please try again.
dialog.success: Your complaint was submitted. We will review it shortly.
dialog.failed: Could not submit complaint. Please try again.

supportChat.missingSession: Please sign in with Mezon to contact support.
supportChat.failed: Could not open support chat. Please try again.

reasons.wrongContent: Lesson content did not match expectations

dialog.title: Cancel trial lesson
dialog.messageFailed: Lesson was cancelled but the tutor notification could not be sent.
dialog.successRefunded: Lesson cancelled. The payment will be refunded to your wallet.
dialog.successNoRefund: Lesson cancelled. Because your lesson was less than 12 hours away, no refund was issued.

policy.eligibleDescription: Your lesson is more than 12 hours away. You will receive a {amount} refund to your wallet if you cancel.
policy.eligibleDescriptionNoAmount: Your lesson is more than 12 hours away. Your payment will be refunded to your wallet if you cancel.
policy.notEligibleDescription: Your lesson is less than 12 hours away. You will not receive a refund if you cancel now.
policy.fallback: Cancel more than 12 hours before the lesson for a refund; within 12 hours, no refund.

reasons.timeNotWork: This time doesn't work for me anymore
reasons.avoidBalanceLoss: I booked this time to avoid losing my balance
reasons.notMotivated: I don't feel motivated to take this lesson
reasons.tutorRescheduledUnavail: The tutor rescheduled to a time when I'm not available
reasons.tutorAskedCancel: The tutor asked me to cancel
reasons.noLongerLearnTutor: I don't want to learn with this tutor anymore

reschedule.failed: Could not reschedule the lesson. Please try another time.
reschedule.within12Hours: Reschedule is only available more than 12 hours before the lesson starts.
reschedule.alreadyRequested: A reschedule request was already submitted for this lesson.

tutors.title: My tutors
tutors.subtitle: You have {count} active tutors this semester.
tutors.discoverDescription: Discover top-rated tutors in Physics, Chemistry, Design, and over 100 other subjects.

complaints.emptyDescription: When you submit a lesson complaint, its review status will appear here.

mobile.noLessonsForDay: No lessons scheduled for this day
